reviews.review_description:
For what you are paying for, you get a full package. The package:

1. Single player 
2. Multi-player
3. A full thing of settings to set the controls and visuals exactly to what you want

The game is good for the price, but, if I'm to be honest about the gameplay itself... It feels lack luster. The Single player missions are pretty easy, and some pretty boring. 

I wish the Single player was more opened. Like, you could travel as you want. The fact that you can't travel as you want makes the system map pointless. 

I will not refund the game because the devs have potential. Hopefully my "investment" leads to the devs taking notes and making their next game better, if they continue to make Scifi games that is.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, yes some day I'd love to make an open world version, like Privateer was to Wing Commander.

reviews.review_description: Firstly I’ll say fi can’t complain too much about the games lack of enjoyment being it’s only $3.99. But it has a lot of potential to be a really enjoyable game, the graphics are pretty adequate,the controls are responsive enough but lack any real feedback. The redundancy comes in fur form of “warping  especially in the beginning, I just kept warping to other locations just to have the objective tell me to warp to another and then a little info about some crystals back to warping along with docking to go onto a “classroom” just to click next mission to warp, warp,warp, and did I mention warp?!?  It didn’t help having multiple crosshairs in my view with no overhead text saying what the yellow box was which I came to learn is the warp location lol. But I wish I could customize the space craft and have some more options to toggle on the controls.  But for being $4.34 with tax and I’m guessing not a major studio developing it. It’s  good for what it is.

reviews.review_title: A must have title for the Quest 2
reviews.review_description:
This is one of the best space titles I've seen for the Quest 2 and very reasonably priced. It is more immersive than most in that you have to depart from your hanger and then warp to a different area of space for every mission before finally returning to your hanger. Most games just start you in the level straight away but this game really feels like you're travelling into space to begin these missions yourself. There are also detailed briefings that are presented to you in a conference room, this is way better than just having a wall of text thrown at you. Plus it has a massive amount of customisable options in the menu to optimize gameplay, which I think is very important. 

The space craft handling is smooth, the graphics and sound effects are great. I prefer to turn the in-game music off to really immerse myself. There's locomotion too so when stationary you can actually walk out of your ship and look around it.

My one and only criticism is that I wish there were more ships you could fly. There's only 2, one of which is only playable in multiplayer mode. The VR Gear version of this game had a different ship with reasonably sized living quarters behind the cockpit, maybe put that in ths Quest 2 version as well? Other than that, a fantastic game.

reviews.review_title: Adictive game, Probably the best ever ..
reviews.review_description:
up date, Thank you for the answer, it was my mistake yes i met the green square.  5 stars great game

‐---‐-------------------------------------

One of the best game for the price ever if you like sciencfiction and dogfight.
For the developer , the third mission, were you colect data trough asteroids going trough green square to colect data,,,,, one of the green square is on the asteroid so you canot go near or through it ...so you canot complet totaly the mission.....unless it make that way to make you go explore and end up on the enemie game....anyway it not a negative note,,,the game is excellent I bought it .... and considering the price,,,,it the best deal ever......and excellent game,,,ant it still under developement ,,,,,,  I give 5 stars....

developer_response.body:
If you mean the third green square / nav point, you need to fly around the giant asteroid to reach it.

Edit: cool, glad to help.

reviews.review_description:
I have an addiction to all things science fiction and as soon as I got my Quest 2 I was on the hunt for a game like this and as many space experiences as I could find.  I have to declare that I'm impressed with what appears to be the work of just one guy pulling together a lot of assets (not to denigrate it for that, it would be an impossible task for one to achieve otherwise).

The price is incredibly good value and I was more than happy to splash on it and because of that it is why I'm driven to enthuse on it here in support. 

It's still in beta so could do with a few tweaks in the audio areas to make the guns feel beefier and some of the voice acting feels like I'm being offered a nice cup of tea when the instruction is to escape for my life, but that's easy fixes. 

And the canon fire itself looks a bit 90s, the flak canons are straight out of Space Harrier which came out in '85!

But I say that with love because I have nothing but respect for this achievement and want it to do really well, as it deserves. 

Buy this game and help support it!

For its price, it is amazing. They could sell this for 10 and it would be fine. The voice acting is meh but that’s fine. Multiplayer isn’t that bad either. If you are not shur, get the free multiplayer demo. Oh yeah, go into the settings and raise the refresh rate ad resolution. Overall, amazing game.
Nothing more to add

This game is totally worth 5 bucks to support the developers. Easily get two hours of enjoyment out of this.  It’s a work in progress that I hope continues to improve.  

Have a wish list for the game …

More ships to fly…

Weapons that work differently, currently they are all the same. You have to fire ahead of targets to hit them. No radar locks, or tracking, 

More weapons 


More in-depth missions. All the missions are all the same . Warp, dogfight move on. 

A radio to play our own music while flying…

Everything is slow, no feeling of any speed.

Don’t see the point of warping as much as I need to but that’s just me. 

There is a demo if you don’t want to spend 5 bucks. 

But it’s worth it….

Update….

Love this game, love the feeling of flying the space crafts. 

Need to play own music while flying ,

Unable to chat in multiplayer, neither all or team. 

Can’t wait to see an update!

Update….

Still love the game…still waiting for an update…

reviews.review_title: Thought I was in No Man's Sky for a sec
reviews.review_description: Best $3.99 you will spend on Quest. Seriously, space looks great, you can crank up the graphics settings as much as your headset will take. Heat seeking missiles...multiple fire modes....interactive cockpit...cool music. Very decent single player campaign for this price AND multilayer for crying out loud. Bravo to this dev.

Very good space combat game. Reminds me a little of Starlancer on the dreamcast, which which is my favourite space shooter. Graphics and general polish really surprised me for the money being asked. It looks amazing and plays brilliantly. The virtual joystick handles very well; the best I've come across! And the audio quality helps add to the immersion. If you're looking to scratch the space fighter itch, you won't go wrong with this game!

This is a great game, well worth the money. I just wish there were more options for the virtual controls. Twisting the controller to adjust the roll feels off. It would be great if you could make the right controller do pitch and roll, and use the left thumb stick for yaw and throttle, similar to Warplanes. Besides that, I have zero issues.
Amazing game.
This is a great space game. Would like to see teams against each other as well as be able to hear each other!
Finally a space shooter in VR
For the price, this game is outstanding 👏

Really easy to learn how to pilot the ship and you have many guns options to change for it. I tried the multiplayer free version and i played for hours, the paid version is worth it!! Buy it you will not be disappointed.

This game is terrific and for the price you can't go wrong.
It kind of reminds me of descent back in the day. It has a lot of potential and  it seems as been a lot of work put into it. Well done devs.

I don't know if I missed the control or it's not there but I don't seem to be able to reverse the ship.

I love it
I wish there were more weapons, more ships that could go faster, more missions and objectives but for the price it's already a steal.
Single player story lacking any real challenge. Multiplayer would be better if you could earn rewards/upgrades for perfrmance. Very fun gameplay though, lots of fun!

Fun as heck … 

Fun and easy to get into a game. 


makes my head hurt a little after a while but that’s just me
